roa.docketEntryComment: /TRL PHASE VD/X: AT 10:55AM, THE JURY AND TWO ALTERNATES ARE SWORN AND THEJURY IS EXCUSED UNTIL 1:30PM,/X: AT 11AM, OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY, THE COURT MEMORIALIZES RULINGS ON THE JURY SELECTION PROCESS AND CONDUCTSAN EC402 EVIDENCE HEARING,/WIT SWORN: CUSTODIAN OF EMT RECORDS, DANESHIAADAMSON/WIT SWORN: STAN LEE/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S ONE, A CD RECORDING OF THE 911 CALL/CTORD: PEOPLE'S ONE IS ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE BOTH FOR THIS HEARINGAND FOR THE TRIAL/X: OVER THE OBJECTION OF DEFENSE, PEOPLE'S ONE MAY BE PLAYED DURING THE OPENING STATEMENT,/X: AFTER THE NOON RECESS, WITH ALL PARTIES AND THE JURY PRESENT, THE TRIALBEGINS WITH COURT INSTRUCTIONS AND OPENING STATEMENTS,/WIT SWORN: SFPD OFFICER EDDIBERTO MARTINEZ/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S TWO, AN ENLARGED GOOGLE MAP SHOWING THE ADDRESSES OF 77 NORTHRIDGE AND 141 ATOLL CIRCLE/X: THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE DEFENDANT'S RESIDENCE BEING141 ATOLL CIRCLE,/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S THREE, A VIDEO GAME CASE TITLED NBA 2K10 IS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION/X: PEOPLE'S 1,2,AND THREE ARE MOVED INTO EVIDENCE,/WIT SWORN: ANGELA LEE/WIT SWORN: JEFFREY LEE/WIT SWORN: SFPD OFFICER AMY BARTHOLOMEW/
